expectations.text: Task decomposition with edge cases — 3 methods become 6+ tasks
expectations.evidence: findById, createUser, deleteUser decomposed into 6 tasks: happy path + error case for each. Presented to user in Korean.

expectations.text: Sequential Agent calls instead of Team API
expectations.evidence: Uses Agent tool for RED/GREEN/REFACTOR. No TeamCreate or SendMessage.

expectations.text: User checkpoint between cycles with modify/add/remove options
expectations.evidence: After cycle 2, explicitly offers: continue, modify tasks, add tasks, reorder, or stop session.
Shows [x]/[>]/[ ] progress checklist after each cycle.
